action.command:
cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && export WANDB_API_KEY="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" && export PINECONE_API_KEY="pcsk_3Vsf8s_UoX9xAA4AzvCu6kJFoAYxMs33WKzL3VdtgMpK2tSQUodh3oVBM62BnSZn22Zgzr" && python3 << 'EOF'
import os
from pinecone import Pinecone

pc = Pinecone(api_key=os.environ["PINECONE_API_KEY"])

# List all indexes
print("=== Pinecone Indexes ===")
indexes = pc.list_indexes()
for idx in indexes:
    print(f"  - {idx.name} (host: {idx.host})")

# Connect to each index and get stats
for idx_info in indexes:
    print(f"\n=== Index: {idx_info.name} ===")
    index = pc.Index(idx_info.name)
    stats = index.describe_index_stats()
    print(f"  Total vectors: {stats.total_vector_count}")
    print(f"  Namespaces: {list(stats.namespaces.keys()) if stats.namespaces else 'default only'}")
    
    # Sample some vectors to see metadata structure
    print(f"\n  Sampling vectors...")
    # Query with a random vector to get some results
    import random
    dim = stats.dimension if hasattr(stats, 'dimension') else 1536
    results = index.query(
        vector=[random.random() for _ in range(dim)],
        top_k=3,
        include_metadata=True
    )
    if results.matches:
        print(f"  Sample metadata keys: {list(results.matches[0].metadata.keys()) if results.matches[0].metadata else 'none'}")
        for i, match in enumerate(results.matches[:2]):
            print(f"\n  Sample {i+1} (id: {match.id[:50]}...):")
            if match.metadata:
                for k, v in list(match.metadata.items())[:8]:
                    val_str = str(v)[:100] + "..." if len(str(v)) > 100 else str(v)
                    print(f"    {k}: {val_str}")
EOF
